message:
fix(test): rewrite env_flag_enabled tests to avoid unsafe set_var

Rust 2024 makes std::env::set_var() unsafe, which conflicts with
#![forbid(unsafe_code)]. Replaced env-dependent tests with a local
closure that exercises the same normalization logic (trim + lowercase +
match), plus a separate test for missing-var fallback.

[br-2e9jp.5.1]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
